items.title: No primitive roles at project level
items.desc: Avoid owner/editor/viewer; use least-privilege custom roles.

items.title: Service account key hygiene
items.desc: Rotate keys, avoid user-managed keys where workload identity works.

items.title: Organization policies enforced
items.desc: Restrict public IPs, require OS Login, and domain-restricted sharing.

items.title: MFA on org admin accounts
items.desc: Enforce 2FA for accounts with org or billing admin.

items.title: Workload Identity Federation
items.desc: Prefer WIF over long-lived service account keys for CI/CD.

items.title: VPC firewall rules least privilege
items.desc: No 0.0.0.0/0 on SSH, RDP, or database ports.

items.title: Private Google Access
items.desc: Enable for subnets that reach Google APIs without public IPs.

items.title: VPC Flow Logs enabled
items.desc: Log all subnet traffic for detection and forensics.

items.title: Cloud Armor on load balancers
items.desc: WAF and DDoS protection for internet-facing services.

items.title: Private Service Connect
items.desc: Use for managed services instead of public endpoints.

items.title: GCS uniform bucket-level access
items.desc: Disable ACLs; use IAM conditions and public access prevention.

items.title: Bucket encryption with CMEK
items.desc: Customer-managed encryption keys for sensitive buckets.

items.title: Cloud SQL not public
items.desc: Private IP only; authorized networks tightly scoped.

items.title: Cloud SQL automated backups
items.desc: Point-in-time recovery and tested restore procedures.

items.title: Object versioning and retention
items.desc: Protect against overwrite and ransomware.

items.title: GKE private cluster
items.desc: Private nodes and authorized networks for control plane.

items.title: Workload Identity enabled
items.desc: Map K8s service accounts to GCP IAM without JSON keys.

items.title: Shielded GCE VMs
items.desc: Secure Boot and vTPM for production instances.

items.title: OS patch management
items.desc: Use OS Config or golden images with regular updates.

items.title: Binary Authorization for GKE
items.desc: Only deploy signed and approved container images.

items.title: Cloud Audit Logs exported
items.desc: Admin, data access, and system events to BigQuery or SIEM.

items.title: Security Command Center Premium
items.desc: Enable threat detection and vulnerability findings.

items.title: Log sinks and retention
items.desc: Centralized sinks with appropriate retention for compliance.

items.title: KMS key rotation
items.desc: Automatic rotation for Cloud KMS keys.

items.title: Alerting on IAM changes
items.desc: Notify on policy bindings, key creation, and firewall edits.
